title: Łomża Heavy Rain
lead: Łomża is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.03. The Score is 10.0/10, indicating a severe anomaly.
body:
The heavy rain in Łomża is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The Z-Score of -3.03 indicates that the current weather conditions are extremely rare, with a Score of 10.0/10. 
 The humidity level is at 96%, with winds of 6.1 km/h, and HDD is at 11.6 GG, while CDD is at 0.0 GG.
